attstr.name: tip
attstr.val: Configure steer sensitivity to steer command (0 = none, any positive)

attstr.val: Configure steer sensitivity to steer command (0 = none, any positive)

attstr.name: tip
attstr.val: Configure steer sensitivity to car speed (0 = none, any positive)

attstr.name: tip
attstr.val: Configure steer sensitivity to car speed (0 = none, any positive)

attstr.name: tip
attstr.val: Configure steer dead zone (0 = none, 1 = all)

attstr.name: tip
attstr.val: Configure steer dead zone (0 = none, 1 = all)
